title: odontarrhena condensata subsp. condensata
intro: Odontarrhena condensata subsp. condensata, also known as the lesser marsh marigold, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Odontarrhena condensata subsp. condensata include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable herb for treating various skin conditions and infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's roots and rhizomes to make a tincture, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
